Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

Here is the summary for the HB Trading 30m cron job:

Current time is Saturday, February 28th, 2026 at 15:00 (Europe/Madrid).

This is a scheduled 30-minute heartbeat check-in for the HB Trading project. During this time, I will:

1. Review the recent daily logs in the memory folder to identify any significant events, decisions, or lessons learned that should be captured in the long-term MEMORY.md file.

2. Update the MEMORY.md file with distilled insights and learnings from the past 1-2 days.

3. Perform a quick sanity check on the workspace files to ensure everything is organized and up-to-date.

4. Send a brief status update to the project stakeholders, noting any notable items from the memory review.

This regular heartbeat helps maintain the project context, keep the long-term memory current, and provide visibility to the team. I will complete these tasks and report back once finished.
